title: A newcomer arrives — and lands in the right place
maps_to: W8 intent-branching onboarding fork (Write / Build world / Translate / Explore)
persona: N-* newcomer — has never used the product, knows none of its words
fixture: no book required. VERIFY-ONLY: the onboarding fork FE already exists (frontend/src/features/onboarding/) — this scenario proves the JOURNEY, not the surface.
canon_facts: the newcomer was routed to the branch that matches what they actually said they wanted
they were never asked to choose between the system's internal names
nothing was created behind their back before they chose

movements.label: I don't know what this is
Am I in the right place?

turns.user: Hi — I just signed up and I have no idea where to start.
I have a novel I wrote in Vietnamese and I want English readers to be able to read it.
OK so what happens next, and where do I go?
